title: Visualizing Searcoid's Approach to Connectedness in Metric Spaces
description: A diagram illustrating the key components and logical flow of Searcoid's treatment of connectedness, showing how different types of connectedness relate to each other and lead to important theorems.
elements: Theorems (e.g., Continuous image of connected is connected)
relationships: A Metric Space is either Connected or has a Disconnection
A Connected Space is made of a single Component
Connectedness is preserved under continuous maps
